name: @uibit/cem-oxc
description: Ultra-fast Custom Elements Manifest generator built with OXC and Rust

scripts.build: napi build --platform --release && cargo build --release --bin cem-oxc-bin && cp target/release/cem-oxc-bin bin/cem-oxc-bin
scripts.build:debug: napi build --platform && cargo build --bin cem-oxc-bin && cp target/debug/cem-oxc-bin bin/cem-oxc-bin
